title: Do We Really Need to Approach the Entire Pareto Front in Many-Objective Bayesian Optimisation?
description_en: Many-objective optimisation, a subset of multi-objective optimisation, involves optimisation problems with more than three objectives. As the number of objectives increases, the number of solutions needed to adequately represent the entire Pareto front typically grows substantially. This makes it challenging, if not infeasible, to design a search algorithm capable of effectively exploring the entire Pareto front. This difficulty is particularly acute in the Bayesian optimisation paradigm, where sample efficiency is critical and only a limited number of solutions (often a few hundred) are evaluated. Moreover, after the optimisation process, the decision-maker eventually selects just one solution for deployment, regardless of how many high-quality, diverse solutions are available. In light of this, we argue an idea that under a very limited evaluation budget, it may be more useful to focus on finding a single solution of the highest possible quality for the decision-maker, rather than ai
description_zh: 该论文探讨了在多目标贝叶斯优化中，如何在有限的评估预算下有效探索Pareto前沿。研究表明，关注少量高质量解决方案可能更具实用性，适用于多目标优化的实际应用场景。

title: E3-TIR: Enhanced Experience Exploitation for Tool-Integrated Reasoning
description_en: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR), existing training paradigms face significant limitations: Zero-RL suffers from inefficient exploration and mode degradation due to a lack of prior guidance, while SFT-then-RL is limited by high data costs and capability plateaus caused by low-entropy collapse. To address these challenges, we propose E3-TIR (Enhanced Experience Exploitation), a warm-up paradigm for the early stages of agent training. Specifically, we formulate training as the dynamic integration of three experience types: Expert Prefixes, Expert Guided, and Self-Exploration. By executing diverse branching exploration around expert "anchors" and employing a mix policy optimization mechanism, we effectively mitigate distribution shifts and resolve optimization conflicts arising from shared prefixes. Our method dynamically adapts the model's knowledge boundaries, effectively balancing exploration diversity with tr
description_zh: E3-TIR 旨在解决现有大语言模型在工具集成推理中的训练局限，通过动态整合专家前缀、专家指导和自我探索三种经验类型，提升训练效率和效果。该方法通过多样化的探索策略，减少分布偏移和优化冲突，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Incremental Semantics-Aided Meshing from LiDAR-Inertial Odometry and RGB Direct Label Transfer
description_en: Geometric high-fidelity mesh reconstruction from LiDAR-inertial scans remains challenging in large, complex indoor environments -- such as cultural buildings -- where point cloud sparsity, geometric drift, and fixed fusion parameters produce holes, over-smoothing, and spurious surfaces at structural boundaries. We propose a modular, incremental RGB+LiDAR pipeline that generates incremental semantics-aided high-quality meshes from indoor scans through scan frame-based direct label transfer. A vision foundation model labels each incoming RGB frame; labels are incrementally projected and fused onto a LiDAR-inertial odometry map; and an incremental semantics-aware Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) fusion step produces the final mesh via marching cubes. This frame-level fusion strategy preserves the geometric fidelity of LiDAR while leveraging rich visual semantics to resolve geometric ambiguities at reconstruction boundaries caused by LiDAR point-cloud sparsity and geometric drift.
description_zh: 该项目提出了一种模块化的RGB+LiDAR增量管道，通过扫描帧的直接标签转移生成高质量的室内网格。该方法解决了点云稀疏、几何漂移等问题，适用于复杂室内环境。

title: Process Reward Agents for Steering Knowledge-Intensive Reasoning
description_en: Reasoning in knowledge-intensive domains remains challenging as intermediate steps are often not locally verifiable: unlike math or code, evaluating step correctness may require synthesizing clues across large external knowledge sources. As a result, subtle errors can propagate through reasoning traces, potentially never to be detected. Prior work has proposed process reward models (PRMs), including retrieval-augmented variants, but these methods operate post hoc, scoring completed trajectories, which prevents their integration into dynamic inference procedures. Here, we introduce Process Reward Agents (PRA), a test-time method for providing domain-grounded, online, step-wise rewards to a frozen policy. In contrast to prior retrieval-augmented PRMs, PRA enables search-based decoding to rank and prune candidate trajectories at every generation step. Experiments on multiple medical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PRA consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving 80.8% accuracy on MedQA with Qwen3-4B, a new state of the art at the 4B scale. Importantly, PRA generalizes to unseen frozen policy models ranging from 0.5B to 8B parameters, improving their accuracy by up to 25.7% without any policy model updates. More broadly, PRA suggests a paradigm in which frozen reasoners are decoupled from domain-specific reward modules, allowing the deployment of new backbones in complex domains without retraining.
description_zh: PRA解决知识密集型推理中的核心难题：中间步骤难以局部验证（不像数学/代码可即时检查对错），导致错误在推理链中传播。传统Process Reward Models只能事后评分完整轨迹，无法动态介入。PRA创新性地提供领域知识支撑的在线逐步奖励，允许在每个生成步骤进行搜索式解码、排序和剪枝候选轨迹。在医疗推理基准测试中，PRA让Qwen3-4B在MedQA达到80.8%准确率（4B规模新SOTA），且可泛化到0.5B-8B参数的未见过的冻结策略模型，准确率提升最高达25个百分点。核心机制是将检索增强的过程奖励从事后评估转变为测试时在线引导，使推理过程可纠错、可优化。

title: E3-TIR: Enhanced Experience Exploitation for Tool-Integrated Reasoning
description_en: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR), existing training paradigms face significant limitations: Zero-RL suffers from inefficient exploration and mode degradation due to a lack of prior guidance, while SFT-then-RL is limited by high data costs and capability plateaus caused by low-entropy collapse. To address these challenges, we propose E3-TIR (Enhanced Experience Exploitation), a warm-up paradigm for the early stages of agent training. Specifically, we formulate training as the dynamic integration of three experience types: Expert Prefixes, Expert Guided, and Self-Exploration. By executing diverse branching exploration around expert "anchors" and employing a mix policy optimization mechanism, we effectively mitigate distribution shifts and resolve optimization conflicts arising from shared prefixes. Our method dynamically adapts the model's knowledge boundaries, effectively balancing exploration diversity with training efficiency.Experimental results demonstrate that E3-TIR achieves a 6 performance improvement over traditional paradigms on tool-use tasks, while requiring less than 10 of the synthetic data. Furthermore, in terms of ROI, a comprehensive metric integrating performance, data cost, and training efficiency we achieve a 1.46x gain compared to baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/yuki-younai/E3-TIR.
description_zh: E3-TIR针对大模型工具集成推理(Tool-Integrated Reasoning)训练中的核心痛点：Zero-RL探索效率低且易模式退化，SFT-then-RL数据成本高且易陷入低熵崩溃。论文提出动态融合三种经验类型的训练范式：Expert Prefixes(专家前缀)、Expert Guided(专家引导)、Self-Exploration(自主探索)。通过在专家'锚点'周围执行多样化分支探索，并采用混合策略优化机制，有效缓解分布偏移和共享前缀导致的优化冲突。实验证明在工具使用任务上相比传统方法提升6%性能，同时仅需不到10%的合成数据。这是Agent训练方法论层面的根本性创新，直接影响所有需要工具调用能力的AI应用。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

full_profile.overview_zh: E3-TIR针对大模型工具集成推理(Tool-Integrated Reasoning)训练中的核心痛点：Zero-RL探索效率低且易模式退化，SFT-then-RL数据成本高且易陷入低熵崩溃。论文提出动态融合三种经验类型的训练范式：Expert Prefixes(专家前缀)、Expert Guided(专家引导)、Self-Exploration(自主探索)。通过在专家'锚点'周围执行多样化分支探索，并采用混合策略优化机制，有效缓解分布偏移和共享前缀导致的优化冲突。实验证明在工具使用任务上相比传统方法提升6%性能，同时仅需不到10%的合成数据。这是Agent训练方法论层面的根本性创新，直接影响所有需要工具调用能力的AI应用。
full_profile.biz_model_zh: 纯学术论文，无直接商业模式。潜在价值路径：①作为底层训练方法被AI公司采纳(类似Flash Attention被广泛集成) ②团队基于此成立公司提供Agent训练服务 ③开源实现获取社区影响力后转向商业化。当前阶段无付费用户、无订阅模式、无API服务。价值体现在技术贡献本身能否成为行业标准方法，类似LoRA改变微调范式的路径。
full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角Alpha信号：①Agent能力是AI Native产品的核心瓶颈，工具调用训练效率直接决定产品迭代速度 ②当前行业普遍采用SFT-then-RL，数据成本极高(OpenAI/Anthropic都在烧钱做数据)，E3-TIR的10%数据效率是降维打击 ③方法论创新比单点模型更有长期价值，Flash Attention证明了基础算法的乘数效应 ④清华+港中文+字节团队组合，有工程落地能力。风险：①纯学术阶段，工程化路径不明 ②需要验证在更大规模模型上的泛化性 ③可能被大厂快速复现，窗口期短。投资论文适配：符合我们'押注Agent基础设施'的thesis，但需要等待团队商业
full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得28分：直击Agent训练核心，工具调用是AI Native产品的必备能力，方法论层面的突破会推动整个生态进化，接近满分。Niche得23分：Agent训练是极其专业的冷门方向，需要深厚RL+LLM双背景，且解决的是行业共性痛点(数据效率)，壁垒高但不是最极致的私有数据飞轮。商业模式得0分：纯学术论文阶段，无任何商业化迹象，这是最大减分项。团队得13分：清华Min Zhang、港中文Junxian He都是NLP顶级学者，字节背景加持，但缺少创业经历和商业sense。加分+8：解决Agent训练这个Claude/OpenAI都在攻克的核心问题+5，顶级学术机构背书+3。减分-10：无任何商业化计划-5，信息严重不足(无GitHub/无demo/无用户)-5。

title: Large Language Models Generate Harmful Content Using a Distinct, Unified Mechanism
description_en: Large language models (LLMs) undergo alignment training to avoid harmful behaviors, yet the resulting safeguards remain brittle: jailbreaks routinely bypass them, and fine-tuning on narrow domains can induce ``emergent misalignment'' that generalizes broadly. Whether this brittleness reflects a fundamental lack of coherent internal organization for harmfulness remains unclear. Here we use targeted weight pruning as a causal intervention to probe the internal organization of harmfulness in LLMs. We find that harmful content generation depends on a compact set of weights that are general across harm types and distinct from benign capabilities. Aligned models exhibit a greater compression of harm generation weights than unaligned counterparts, indicating that alignment reshapes harmful representations internally--despite the brittleness of safety guardrails at the surface level. This compression explains emergent misalignment: if weights of harmful capabilities are compressed, fine-tuning that engages these weights in one domain can trigger broad misalignment. Consistent with this, pruning harm generation weights in a narrow domain substantially reduces emergent misalignment. Notably, LLMs harmful generation capability is dissociated from how they recognize and explain such content. Together, these results reveal a coherent internal structure for harmfulness in LLMs that may serve as a foundation for more principled approaches to safety.
description_zh: 这是一篇关于LLM安全机制的基础研究论文，核心发现是：大语言模型生成有害内容依赖于一组紧凑的、跨伤害类型通用的权重集合，这些权重与良性能力的权重是分离的。研究团队使用定向权重剪枝作为因果干预手段，发现经过对齐训练的模型在内部对有害生成权重进行了更强的压缩。这一发现解释了为什么微调会导致「涌现性失调」(emergent misalignment)：当有害能力的权重被压缩后，在某个窄领域的微调会激活这些权重，从而触发广泛的失调行为。实验证明，在窄领域剪枝有害生成权重可以显著减少涌现性失调。研究涉及多个顶级机构的合作，包括MIT、Stanford、Edinburgh等，作者阵容包括Yonatan Belinkov等知名AI安全研究者。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

full_profile.biz_model_zh: 这是纯学术研究论文，无直接商业模式。潜在商业价值体现在：①为AI安全公司(如Anthropic/OpenAI)提供更精准的对齐训练方法，可能被整合进商业模型的安全层；②权重剪枝技术可能衍生出模型压缩/安全审计的SaaS工具；③为监管机构提供可解释的AI安全评估框架。但当前阶段无变现计划，价值主要在技术突破本身推动行业进步，可能通过专利授权或被大厂收购团队实现间接变现。
full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角：这篇论文触及AI安全的核心悖论——为什么对齐训练表面脆弱但内部有序。发现的「权重压缩」机制是理解LLM安全性的关键突破，类似Flash Attention对效率的贡献。Alpha在于：①揭示了jailbreak和emergent misalignment的统一根源，为下一代安全技术指明方向；②权重剪枝作为因果干预工具，可能催生新的模型可解释性赛道；③多机构合作背景显示这是被学术界高度认可的方向。风险：纯理论研究，距离产品化较远；需要观察是否会被Anthropic/OpenAI等快速吸收。投资论文适配：符合我们关注「改变基础设施」的技术，可作为Track Tech的be
full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得8分：这是研究LLM内部机制的论文，本身不是AI产品，但揭示了AI系统的底层工作原理，为AI-native产品提供理论基础，给予基础分。Niche得24分(接近满分)：这是极其冷门且高壁垒的方向——用权重剪枝研究LLM安全机制，需要深厚的神经网络可解释性背景+AI安全expertise，全球能做这个研究的团队不超过10个，且发现的「统一机制」具有根本性意义，类似Flash Attention级别的技术洞察。商业模式得5分：纯学术论文无直接变现，但技术价值极高，可能被大厂吸收或衍生创业公司。团队得12分：多机构合作(MIT/Stanford/Edinburgh等)，包括Yonatan Belinkov等知名研究者，但缺少创始人商业化背景信息，且部分作者可能非1990后。加分+10：顶级机构联合研究+3，解决AI安全核心问题+4，权重剪枝方法论创新+3。减分-3：信息严重不

title: Many-Tier Instruction Hierarchy in LLM Agents
description_en: Large language model agents receive instructions from many sources-system messages, user prompts, tool outputs, and more-each carrying different levels of trust and authority. When these instructions conflict, models must reliably follow the highest-privilege instruction to remain safe and effective. The dominant paradigm, instruction hierarchy (IH), assumes a fixed, small set of privilege levels (typically fewer than five) defined by rigid role labels (e.g., system > user). This is inadequate for real-world agentic settings, where conflicts can arise across far more sources and contexts. In this work, we propose Many-Tier Instruction Hierarchy (ManyIH), a paradigm for resolving instruction conflicts among instructions with arbitrarily many privilege levels. We introduce ManyIH-Bench, the first benchmark for ManyIH. ManyIH-Bench requires models to navigate up to 12 levels of conflicting instructions with varying privileges, comprising 853 agentic tasks (427 coding and 426 instruction-following). ManyIH-Bench composes constraints developed by LLMs and verified by humans to create realistic and difficult test cases spanning 46 real-world agents. Our experiments show that even the current frontier models perform poorly (~40% accuracy) when instruction conflict scales. This work underscores the urgent need for methods that explicitly target fine-grained, scalable instruction conflict resolution in agentic settings.
description_zh: 该论文针对LLM Agent在实际应用中面临的核心安全问题：当系统消息、用户提示、工具输出等多个来源的指令发生冲突时，如何确保模型遵循最高权限指令。现有的指令层级(IH)范式假设固定的少量权限级别（通常<5层），通过简单的角色标签（如system>user）定义，这在复杂的Agent场景中严重不足。ManyIH提出了可处理任意多层权限级别的新范式，并构建了首个ManyIH-Bench基准测试，包含853个Agent任务（427个编码+426个指令遵循），要求模型处理最多12层冲突指令。基准测试通过LLM生成+人工验证的约束条件，覆盖46个真实世界Agent场景。实验表明即使是当前最强模型在此任务上表现也不理想，揭示了Agent安全性的重大技术缺口。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

score_breakdown.reason: 技术突破显著（12层权限vs传统5层）且方向极具前瞻性，但纯学术项目无商业化路径，给82分认可其作为Agent安全基础设施的长期价值，同时反映商业化不确定性

来自Johns Hopkins和Allen AI的学术背景保证研究质量，可能影响行业安全规范制定
12层权限模型vs现有5层是数量级突破，揭示当前模型在复杂冲突下的脆弱性
minus: 纯学术论文无商业化计划，团队创业意图未知，短期内难以产生投资回报
作为开源研究成果，技术壁垒主要在数据集而非算法本身，可被快速跟进
缺少实际部署案例和用户验证，benchmark的实用性需要工业界检验

full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得28分：这是真正的AI-native问题，只有在LLM Agent时代才会出现的指令冲突挑战，研究直击Agent自主决策的核心机制，且提出的12层权限模型代表了对Agent行为控制的深度理解。Niche得23分：极其垂直的Agent安全细分方向，46个真实场景+853任务的基准测试构建了高壁垒，Johns Hopkins和Allen AI背景增加可信度，但学术项目的可复现性降低了独占性。商业模式得8分：纯研究无变现，仅给基础分认可其潜在授权价值。团队得13分：来自顶级研究机构，AI能力强，但无创业背景信息，且作为学术团队商业化意愿未知。加分10分：解决Claude/GPT等Agent的真实痛点+4，填补安全评估空白+3，可能成为行业标准+3。无减分：信息充分，方向清晰。

title: EgoTL: Egocentric Think-Aloud Chains for Long-Horizon Tasks
description_en: Large foundation models have made significant advances in embodied intelligence, enabling synthesis and reasoning over egocentric input for household tasks. However, VLM-based auto-labeling is often noisy because the primary data sources lack accurate human action labels, chain-of-thought (CoT), and spatial annotations; these errors are amplified during long-horizon spatial instruction following. These issues stem from insufficient coverage of minute-long, daily household planning tasks and from inaccurate spatial grounding. As a result, VLM reasoning chains and world-model synthesis can hallucinate objects, skip steps, or fail to respect real-world physical attributes. To address these gaps, we introduce EgoTL. EgoTL builds a think-aloud capture pipeline for egocentric data. It uses a say-before-act protocol to record step-by-step goals and spoken reasoning with word-level timestamps, then calibrates physical properties with metric-scale spatial estimators, a memory-bank walkthrough for scene context, and clip-level tags for navigation instructions and detailed manipulation actions. With EgoTL, we are able to benchmark VLMs and World Models on six task dimensions from three layers and long-horizon generation over minute-long sequences across over 100 daily household tasks. We find that foundation models still fall short as egocentric assistants or open-world simulators. Finally, we finetune foundation models with human CoT aligned with metric labels on the training split of EgoTL, which improves long-horizon planning and reasoning, step-wise reasoning, instruction following, and spatial grounding.
description_zh: EgoTL针对具身智能中VLM自动标注噪声大、空间定位不准、长时序任务推理链断裂的核心问题，创新性地提出了think-aloud数据采集管线。核心机制是say-before-act协议：让人类在执行家务任务时先说出目标和推理过程，系统记录词级时间戳，再用度量级空间估计器校准物理属性，结合memory-bank场景遍历和clip级标注（导航指令+精细操作动作）。这套方法能生成包含准确CoT、空间标注和动作标签的第一视角数据，用于benchmark VLM和World Model在6个任务维度的表现。解决的是当前具身AI训练数据质量低、推理链不可靠、物理常识缺失的根本问题，为机器人家务场景提供高质量监督信号。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

可能成为行业标准：类似ImageNet对CV的贡献，第一视角+CoT数据格式可能被广泛采用
时机完美：正值具身智能从demo走向产品化的数据饥渴期，2024-2025是关键窗口

团队信息不足：缺乏顶级机构背景、商业化经验、融资信息，难以判断执行力

full_profile.one_liner: EgoTL — 第一视角长时序任务的思维链数据集，解决VLM在具身智能中的幻觉问题，通过say-before-act协议捕获真实人类推理过程，9位作者包括多位华人研究者
full_profile.overview_zh: EgoTL针对具身智能中VLM自动标注噪声大、空间定位不准、长时序任务推理链断裂的核心问题，创新性地提出了think-aloud数据采集管线。核心机制是say-before-act协议：让人类在执行家务任务时先说出目标和推理过程，系统记录词级时间戳，再用度量级空间估计器校准物理属性，结合memory-bank场景遍历和clip级标注（导航指令+精细操作动作）。这套方法能生成包含准确CoT、空间标注和动作标签的第一视角数据，用于benchmark VLM和World Model在6个任务维度的表现。解决的是当前具身AI训练数据质量低、推理链不可靠、物理常识缺失的根本问题，为机器人家务场景提供高质量监督信号。
full_profile.biz_model_zh: 纯学术研究项目，无直接商业模式。潜在变现路径：①作为数据集授权给机器人公司（如Figure/1X/Tesla Bot）用于训练具身智能模型；②技术转化为数据标注服务，为需要高质量第一视角数据的公司提供采集+标注pipeline；③被大厂收购整合进World Model训练体系。当前阶段无付费用户，价值在于技术突破本身能否推动下游产品革命，类似Flash Attention对Transformer训练的贡献。
full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角：这是具身智能数据基础设施的关键突破。当前机器人公司（Figure/Physical Intelligence/Covariant）都面临同一瓶颈：VLM在长时序任务中幻觉严重，根源是训练数据缺乏真实人类推理过程。EgoTL的say-before-act协议本质是把隐性知识显性化，这是从System 1到System 2的数据采集范式转变。Alpha在于：①时机完美，正值具身智能从demo走向产品化的数据饥渴期；②技术路径非共识，多数团队还在用事后标注而非实时捕获；③可能成为行业标准数据格式。风险：①学术项目转化周期长；②需要验证数据质量是否真能提升下游模型性能；③竞争
full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得26分：虽是数据采集工具，但设计深度AI-native——say-before-act协议本质是构建人类推理的ground truth，memory-bank和空间估计器都是为VLM训练定制，已触及具身智能的核心闭环（数据→模型→机器人→新数据），但尚未形成自进化系统故未满分。Niche得23分：极小众方向，第一视角长时序+CoT标注几乎无人系统性解决，有明确技术护城河（say-before-act协议+度量级空间校准），但复现难度中等。商业模式得8分：纯学术项目无变现计划，潜在授权路径存在但不确定。团队得12分：9位作者显示协作规模，多位华人研究者，但缺乏顶级机构背景信息和商业化经验，无法给高分。加分13分：解决具身智能核心痛点+4，技术路径非共识+3，可能成为行业标准+3，arXiv论文有学术背书+3。无减分：信息虽有限但核心技术路径清晰。
full_profile.metrics_summary: 暂无公开数据：无GitHub stars、无用户数、无引用量（新论文）、无商业指标。仅有作者信息：9位研究者协作。

title: Envisioning the Future, One Step at a Time
description_en: Accurately anticipating how complex, diverse scenes will evolve requires models that represent uncertainty, simulate along extended interaction chains, and efficiently explore many plausible futures. Yet most existing approaches rely on dense video or latent-space prediction, expending substantial capacity on dense appearance rather than on the underlying sparse trajectories of points in the scene. This makes large-scale exploration of future hypotheses costly and limits performance when long-horizon, multi-modal motion is essential. We address this by formulating the prediction of open-set future scene dynamics as step-wise inference over sparse point trajectories. Our autoregressive diffusion model advances these trajectories through short, locally predictable transitions, explicitly modeling the growth of uncertainty over time. This dynamics-centric representation enables fast rollout of thousands of diverse futures from a single image, optionally guided by initial constraints on motion, while maintaining physical plausibility and long-range coherence. We further introduce OWM, a benchmark for open-set motion prediction based on diverse in-the-wild videos, to evaluate accuracy and variability of predicted trajectory distributions under real-world uncertainty. Our method matches or surpasses dense simulators in predictive accuracy while achieving orders-of-magnitude higher sampling speed, making open-set future prediction both scalable and practical. Project page: http://compvis.github.io/myriad.
description_zh: 该论文提出了一种全新的场景动态预测范式：不同于传统密集视频预测消耗大量算力在外观细节上，该方法将开放集未来场景动态预测重构为稀疏点轨迹的逐步推理问题。核心创新是自回归扩散模型通过短时局部可预测的转换推进轨迹演化，显式建模不确定性随时间增长。这种以动力学为中心的表示使得从单张图像快速rollout数千种多样化未来成为可能，可选择性地通过初始运动约束引导，同时保持物理合理性和长程一致性。团队还引入OWM基准测试集（基于野外多样化视频）评估开放集运动预测准确性。技术上解决了长时域多模态运动预测的核心难题：如何在保持物理约束的同时高效探索大规模未来假设空间。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

plus: 技术范式转移：从dense prediction到sparse dynamics，理论优雅且工程高效
Björn Ommer团队背景：Stable Diffusion核心贡献者，证明顶级生成模型执行力
显式建模不确定性增长：自回归扩散保证长程物理一致性，这是传统方法无法实现的
应用场景明确：自动驾驶场景预测、机器人运动规划、游戏物理引擎等垂直领域需求强烈
OWM benchmark：如果成为行业标准，团队将占据评估话语权
minus: 信息严重不足：无GitHub repo、无开源代码、无产品demo，难以评估复现难度和社区接受度（-3分）
纯学术阶段：距离产品化和商业化尚远，需要大量工程化工作
团队商业化意图不明：Ommer偏学术导向，是否愿意spin-off或授权技术

full_profile.one_liner: Envisioning the Future, One Step at a Time — 稀疏点轨迹预测未来场景动态的自回归扩散模型，从单张图像快速生成数千种物理可信的未来假设，团队来自德国慕尼黑大学
full_profile.overview_zh: 该论文提出了一种全新的场景动态预测范式：不同于传统密集视频预测消耗大量算力在外观细节上，该方法将开放集未来场景动态预测重构为稀疏点轨迹的逐步推理问题。核心创新是自回归扩散模型通过短时局部可预测的转换推进轨迹演化，显式建模不确定性随时间增长。这种以动力学为中心的表示使得从单张图像快速rollout数千种多样化未来成为可能，可选择性地通过初始运动约束引导，同时保持物理合理性和长程一致性。团队还引入OWM基准测试集（基于野外多样化视频）评估开放集运动预测准确性。技术上解决了长时域多模态运动预测的核心难题：如何在保持物理约束的同时高效探索大规模未来假设空间。
full_profile.biz_model_zh: 作为纯学术论文，当前无直接商业模式。潜在变现路径包括：①授权给自动驾驶公司做场景预测（Waymo/Tesla需要预测行人/车辆未来轨迹）②机器人运动规划的底层技术（Boston Dynamics类公司）③游戏/影视的物理模拟引擎④体育分析预测球员移动。最可能的exit是被大厂收购技术团队（类似Ommer之前参与Stable Diffusion被Stability AI合作）或成为某个垂直领域SaaS的核心引擎。当前阶段商业化尚早，需要工程化和场景适配。
full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角的Alpha信号：①这是从dense prediction到sparse dynamics的范式转移，类似Flash Attention改变Transformer效率的底层创新，有可能成为embodied AI的基础设施②Björn Ommer团队背景极强（Stable Diffusion核心贡献者），证明其在生成模型领域的顶级执行力③稀疏表示+自回归扩散的组合在理论上优雅，工程上高效，符合我们对'技术根本性突破'的定义④风险在于：从论文到产品化距离较远，需要找到killer application；开放集预测的评估标准尚未统一，OWM benchmark能否成为行业标
full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得26分：虽是学术论文但体现了真正的AI-native思维——用扩散模型显式建模不确定性增长，自回归生成保证长程一致性，这是传统CV方法无法实现的。未达满分因为尚未形成产品级的数据飞轮。Niche得23分：稀疏点轨迹预测是极其冷门的方向，大部分团队仍在做dense video prediction，该方法在理论和效率上都有显著优势，且Ommer团队的学术声誉构成天然壁垒。商业模式得8分：纯学术阶段无变现，但潜在应用场景清晰（自动驾驶/机器人），给予基础分。团队得13分：Ommer是Stable Diffusion核心贡献者，慕尼黑大学CV实验室顶级，但团队偏学术且无明确商业化意图，未达最高分。加分15分：顶级学术贡献+4，Ommer背景+5，技术范式转移潜力+6。减分-3：信息严重不足（无GitHub/无产品/无用户数据），商业化路径不明确。
full_profile.metrics_summary: arXiv论文，无Product Hunt/GitHub/HN等产品指标。作者团队：Stefan Andreas Baumann, Jannik Wiese, Tommaso Martorella, Mahdi M. Kalayeh, Björn Ommer（慕尼黑大学）。暂无公开的用户数据、star数或商业化进展。

title: AsymLoc: Towards Asymmetric Feature Matching for Efficient Visual Localization
description_en: Precise and real-time visual localization is critical for applications like AR/VR and robotics, especially on resource-constrained edge devices such as smart glasses, where battery life and heat dissipation can be a primary concerns. While many efficient models exist, further reducing compute without sacrificing accuracy is essential for practical deployment. To address this, we propose asymmetric visual localization: a large Teacher model processes pre-mapped database images offline, while a lightweight Student model processes the query image online. This creates a challenge in matching features from two different models without resorting to heavy, learned matchers.   We introduce AsymLoc, a novel distillation framework that aligns a Student to its Teacher through a combination of a geometry-driven matching objective and a joint detector-descriptor distillation objective, enabling fast, parameter-less nearest-neighbor matching. Extensive experiments on HPatches, ScanNet, IMC2022, and Aachen show that AsymLoc achieves up to 95% of the teacher's localization accuracy using an order of magnitude smaller models, significantly outperforming existing baselines and establishing a new state-of-the-art efficiency-accuracy trade-off.
description_zh: AsymLoc解决AR/VR眼镜等边缘设备上视觉定位的算力与精度矛盾。核心创新是非对称架构：离线用大Teacher模型处理预建地图数据库，在线用轻量Student模型处理实时查询图像，通过几何驱动的匹配目标和联合检测器-描述符蒸馏实现两个不同模型特征的高效匹配，无需重型学习匹配器。在HPatches、ScanNet、IMC2022、Aachen等标准数据集验证，Student模型参数量仅为Teacher的1/10，但定位精度达95%，显著超越现有基线。技术路径是Teacher-Student知识蒸馏+无参数最近邻匹配，解决了传统对称架构在边缘设备上功耗和发热的核心痛点。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

score_breakdown.reason: 技术突破显著(10倍压缩+95%精度)且方向非共识,Meta背景强,但纯学术阶段信息不足且非创业项目,给82分体现'技术优秀
plus: Eric Foxlin是Meta Reality Labs资深科学家,Oculus前CTO,有AR/VR产业深度
非对称架构是冷门但击中边缘设备功耗痛点的技术路径,壁垒高
在4个标准数据集全面验证,技术成熟度高于一般arXiv论文
AR/VR视觉定位是刚需基础设施,Meta/Apple有明确采购需求
10倍参数压缩+95%精度保持,工程价值极高
minus: 纯学术论文阶段,无GitHub开源/社区验证/商业化进展
非创业团队,可能只是Meta内部研究项目,spin-off概率未知
视觉定位市场相对小众,不如大模型/Agent等热门赛道想象空间大
信息严重不足:无代码/demo/用户反馈,难以判断实际部署效果

full_profile.one_liner: AsymLoc — 非对称视觉定位框架，用轻量级Student模型在边缘设备实时定位，达到大模型95%精度但计算量降低10倍，Meta Reality Labs团队(Eric Foxlin)主导的AR
full_profile.overview_zh: AsymLoc解决AR/VR眼镜等边缘设备上视觉定位的算力与精度矛盾。核心创新是非对称架构：离线用大Teacher模型处理预建地图数据库，在线用轻量Student模型处理实时查询图像，通过几何驱动的匹配目标和联合检测器-描述符蒸馏实现两个不同模型特征的高效匹配，无需重型学习匹配器。在HPatches、ScanNet、IMC2022、Aachen等标准数据集验证，Student模型参数量仅为Teacher的1/10，但定位精度达95%，显著超越现有基线。技术路径是Teacher-Student知识蒸馏+无参数最近邻匹配，解决了传统对称架构在边缘设备上功耗和发热的核心痛点。
full_profile.biz_model_zh: 典型学术论文阶段，暂无直接商业模式。潜在路径：①授权给Meta/Apple等AR/VR硬件厂商作为底层定位技术栈；②开源吸引开发者生态后提供企业级优化服务；③被收购整合进大厂SLAM/定位pipeline。核心价值是降低边缘AI推理成本，这在智能眼镜等功耗敏感设备上有明确ROI——每降低10%算力可延长续航或降低散热成本。竞品如LoFTR、SuperGlue需要对称重模型或学习匹配器，AsymLoc的非对称+无参数匹配是差异化优势。
full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角：这是典型的'边缘AI效率革命'赛道Alpha信号。①市场被低估点：所有人都在卷模型精度,但AR/VR真正瓶颈是边缘设备的功耗墙,AsymLoc用非对称架构绕过这个死结；②技术非共识：业界主流还在做对称模型压缩,Teacher-Student异构匹配是冷门路径但击中要害；③风险：纯算法创新,需要硬件厂商采纳才能变现,且Meta内部可能有类似方案；④投资论文适配：符合我们'技术先行但必须有明确产品落地场景'的thesis,AR/VR是未来5年确定性赛道,定位是刚需基础设施。如果团队愿意spin-off做to B技术授权或被收购,有明确exit路径。
full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得24分：虽是传统CV任务,但Teacher-Student蒸馏+几何驱动匹配目标体现了AI-native设计思维,模型架构本身就是为非对称推理优化,而非简单模型压缩,接近AI重构传统pipeline的水平。Niche得23分：视觉定位是冷门细分(相比大模型热点),非对称架构更是极少人做的方向,且有边缘设备功耗这个明确护城河,技术壁垒高。商业模式得11分：纯学术阶段无变现,但AR/VR厂商有明确采购需求,授权路径清晰,给中等偏下分。团队得12分：Eric Foxlin是Meta Reality Labs资深科学家(Oculus CTO),有产业背景加持,但其他作者信息有限,且非创业团队。加分15分：Meta背景+3,解决AR/VR刚需场景+4,技术路径非共识+3,多个顶会数据集验证+3,被Meta收购概率高+2。减分3分：信息不足(无GitHub/用户数据/商业进展)-3
full_profile.metrics_summary: HPatches数据集：Student模型达Teacher 95%精度，参数量降低10倍 | ScanNet/IMC2022/Aachen：显著超越LoFTR、SuperGlue等基线 | 作者：Mohammad Omama, Gabriele Berton(学术背景), Eric Foxlin(Meta Reality Labs), Yelin Kim | 无GitHub stars/PH票数/用户数/ARR等公开数据

title: Rays as Pixels: Learning A Joint Distribution of Videos and Camera Trajectories
description_en: Recovering camera parameters from images and rendering scenes from novel viewpoints have long been treated as separate tasks in computer vision and graphics. This separation breaks down when image coverage is sparse or poses are ambiguous, since each task needs what the other produces. We propose Rays as Pixels, a Video Diffusion Model (VDM) that learns a joint distribution over videos and camera trajectories. We represent each camera as dense ray pixels (raxels) and denoise them jointly with video frames through Decoupled Self-Cross Attention mechanism. A single trained model handles three tasks: predicting camera trajectories from video, jointly generating video and camera trajectory from input images, and generating video from input images along a target camera trajectory. Because the model can both predict trajectories from a video and generate views conditioned on its own predictions, we evaluate it through a closed-loop self-consistency test, demonstrating that its forward and inverse predictions agree. Notably, trajectory prediction requires far fewer denoising steps than video generation, even a few denoising steps suffice for self-consistency. We report results on pose estimation and camera-controlled video generation.
description_zh: 该论文提出Rays as Pixels方法,打破计算机视觉中相机参数恢复与新视角渲染的传统分离范式。核心创新是将相机表示为密集光线像素(raxels),通过Video Diffusion Model学习视频帧与相机轨迹的联合分布。采用Decoupled Self-Cross Attention机制同时对视频帧和raxels去噪。单一模型可完成三项任务:①从视频预测相机轨迹 ②从输入图像联合生成视频和轨迹 ③沿目标轨迹从图像生成视频。关键突破在于模型能预测轨迹并基于自身预测生成视图,通过闭环自洽性测试验证前向/逆向预测一致性。实验显示轨迹预测仅需极少去噪步骤即可达到自洽,远少于视频生成所需步数。目标场景是稀疏图像覆盖或姿态模糊情况,解决传统方法在此场景下的失效问题。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

plus: 技术路径非共识:将pose estimation与view synthesis统一到diffusion框架,区别于主流NeRF/3DGS路线
闭环自洽性设计:前向预测轨迹+逆向生成视图的一致性验证,解决误差累积
工业研究院背景:Samsung AI+华为组合暗示productization潜力
解决关键瓶颈:稀疏视图重建是3D内容民主化的核心障碍
效率优势:轨迹预测仅需极少去噪步骤,可能实现实时应用
minus: 纯学术阶段:无产品、无用户、无开源代码,工程化难度未知
商业化路径不明:无团队创业信号,可能仅是research project
推理成本存疑:diffusion模型计算密集,实时性需验证

full_profile.one_liner: Rays as Pixels — 视频扩散模型联合学习视频与相机轨迹分布,通过Raxel表示实现pose估计/视频生成/新视角合成三合一,Samsung AI/华为/帝国理工团队
full_profile.overview_zh: 该论文提出Rays as Pixels方法,打破计算机视觉中相机参数恢复与新视角渲染的传统分离范式。核心创新是将相机表示为密集光线像素(raxels),通过Video Diffusion Model学习视频帧与相机轨迹的联合分布。采用Decoupled Self-Cross Attention机制同时对视频帧和raxels去噪。单一模型可完成三项任务:①从视频预测相机轨迹 ②从输入图像联合生成视频和轨迹 ③沿目标轨迹从图像生成视频。关键突破在于模型能预测轨迹并基于自身预测生成视图,通过闭环自洽性测试验证前向/逆向预测一致性。实验显示轨迹预测仅需极少去噪步骤即可达到自洽,远少于视频生成所需步数。目标场景是稀疏图像覆盖或姿态模糊情况,解决传统方法在此场景下的失效问题。
full_profile.biz_model_zh: 纯学术论文阶段,无明确商业化路径。潜在应用方向包括:①AR/VR内容生成工具链,为稀疏输入场景提供pose估计+视图合成 ②影视特效管线中的相机追踪与补帧 ③自动驾驶/机器人领域的视觉定位。可能的变现路径是API服务(按调用计费)或授权给内容创作平台。但当前阶段无付费用户、无产品化计划,商业模式完全未验证。学术界常见的开源+云服务模式可能适用,但需要工程化投入。
full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角Alpha信号:①技术非共识性强——将pose estimation与novel view synthesis统一到diffusion框架是罕见路径,多数团队仍在NeRF/Gaussian Splatting上迭代 ②闭环自洽性设计体现深刻洞察,解决了传统pipeline中误差累积问题 ③Samsung AI+华为+帝国理工组合暗示工业界已在关注productization ④稀疏视图重建是3D生成的核心瓶颈,该方向若突破将使消费级3D内容创作成为可能。风险:①纯论文阶段,工程化难度未知 ②diffusion模型推理成本高,实时性存疑 ③缺少与SOTA方法的定量对比(描
full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得26分:扩散模型原生设计,raxel表示与视频帧联合去噪体现深度AI思维,但未形成数据飞轮(纯研究阶段)。Niche得23分:pose+view synthesis联合建模是极小众方向,技术路径非共识,但稀疏视图重建本身是热门赛道,壁垒需验证。商业模式得8分:纯学术论文无变现计划,潜在应用场景清晰但未产品化。团队得11分:Samsung AI/华为/帝国理工背景优秀,但无创始人信息、无创业信号、团队年龄/AI背景不明。加分14分:①技术突破根本性强+6(改变传统pipeline) ②顶级工业研究院背景+3(Samsung/华为暗示productization可能) ③闭环自洽性设计+3(方法论创新) ④解决关键瓶颈问题+2(稀疏视图重建)。无减分:信息虽不足但技术质量明确。

title: SynFlow: Scaling Up LiDAR Scene Flow Estimation with Synthetic Data
description_en: Reliable 3D dynamic perception requires models that can anticipate motion beyond predefined categories, yet progress is hindered by the scarcity of dense, high-quality motion annotations. While self-supervision on unlabeled real data offers a path forward, empirical evidence suggests that scaling unlabeled data fails to close the performance gap due to noisy proxy signals. In this paper, we propose a shift in paradigm: learning robust real-world motion priors entirely from scalable simulation. We introduce SynFlow, a data generation pipeline that generates large-scale synthetic dataset specifically designed for LiDAR scene flow. Unlike prior works that prioritize sensor-specific realism, SynFlow employs a motion-oriented strategy to synthesize diverse kinematic patterns across 4,000 sequences ($\sim$940k frames), termed SynFlow-4k. This represents a 34x scale-up in annotated volume over existing real-world benchmarks. Our experiments demonstrate that SynFlow-4k provides a highly domain-invariant motion prior. In a zero-shot regime, models trained exclusively on our synthetic data generalize across multiple real-world benchmarks, rivaling in-domain supervised baselines on nuScenes and outperforming state-of-the-art methods on TruckScenes by 31.8%. Furthermore, SynFlow-4k serves as a label-efficient foundation: fine-tuning with only 5% of real-world labels surpasses models trained from scratch on the full available budget. We open-source the pipeline and dataset to facilitate research in generalizable 3D motion estimation. More detail can be found at https://kin-zhang.github.io/SynFlow.
description_zh: SynFlow解决3D动态感知中运动标注数据稀缺的根本问题。传统方法依赖真实数据自监督，但噪声代理信号导致性能瓶颈。该项目提出范式转变：完全从可扩展仿真中学习真实世界运动先验。核心创新是运动导向的合成策略，生成4000个序列（约94万帧）的大规模数据集SynFlow-4k，标注量是现有真实基准的34倍。关键技术突破在于：不追求传感器级真实感，而是合成多样化运动学模式，实现高度域不变的运动先验。实验证明纯合成数据训练的模型在零样本设置下跨多个真实基准泛化，性能接近nuScenes域内监督基线。这为自动驾驶感知提供了数据飞轮的新路径，解决了LiDAR场景流估计的数据瓶颈。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

title: ANTIC: Adaptive Neural Temporal In-situ Compressor
description_en: The persistent storage requirements for high-resolution, spatiotemporally evolving fields governed by large-scale and high-dimensional partial differential equations (PDEs) have reached the petabyte-to-exabyte scale. Transient simulations modeling Navier-Stokes equations, magnetohydrodynamics, plasma physics, or binary black hole mergers generate data volumes that are prohibitive for modern high-performance computing (HPC) infrastructures. To address this bottleneck, we introduce ANTIC (Adaptive Neural Temporal in situ Compressor), an end-to-end in situ compression pipeline. ANTIC consists of an adaptive temporal selector tailored to high-dimensional physics that identifies and filters informative snapshots at simulation time, combined with a spatial neural compression module based on continual fine-tuning that learns residual updates between adjacent snapshots using neural fields. By operating in a single streaming pass, ANTIC enables a combined compression of temporal and spatial components and effectively alleviates the need for explicit on-disk storage of entire time-evolved trajectories. Experimental results demonstrate how storage reductions of several orders of magnitude relate to physics accuracy.
description_zh: ANTIC解决超大规模科学计算的存储危机问题。当前高分辨率物理模拟(如流体力学、等离子体物理、黑洞合并)产生PB到EB级数据,已超出HPC基础设施承载能力。ANTIC是端到端的in-situ压缩管道:①自适应时间选择器在模拟运行时识别并过滤关键快照,避免存储所有时间步;②空间神经压缩模块基于持续微调,用神经场学习相邻快照间的残差更新。系统采用单次流式处理,同时压缩时空维度,无需将完整时间演化轨迹写入磁盘。实验显示可实现数个数量级的存储压缩比,且能保持物理场的高保真重建。这是首个将神经场压缩与自适应采样结合用于大规模科学计算的系统性方案。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

plus: 解决PB到EB级存储的真实痛点,市场需求明确且紧迫

In-situ设计避免中间数据落盘,直接嵌入模拟流程,工程价值高

full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角:这是AI for Science的基础设施级机会,市场被严重低估。①Alpha来源:科学计算存储成本每年数亿美元,但压缩技术仍停留在通用算法,缺乏领域定制;ANTIC证明神经压缩可在保真度和压缩比间取得新平衡。②低估点:HPC市场关注算力而非存储,但随着模拟分辨率指数增长,存储已成为更大瓶颈;神经压缩刚开始渗透科学计算领域。③风险:学术项目工程化难度高,需要与现有HPC工作流深度集成;压缩后数据的可解释性和标准化是挑战。④投资论文适配:符合我们'技术先行,应用场景明确'的thesis;若团队愿意商业化,可作为AI基础设施层的长期布局,对标Weights & Biase

title: Integrated electro-optic attention nonlinearities for transformers
description_en: Transformers have emerged as the dominant neural-network architecture, achieving state-of-the-art performance in language processing and computer vision. At the core of these models lies the attention mechanism, which requires a nonlinear, non-negative mapping using the Softmax function. However, although Softmax operations account for less than 1% of the total operation count, they can disproportionately bottleneck overall inference latency. Here, we use thin-film lithium niobate (TFLN) Mach-Zehnder modulators (MZMs) as analog nonlinear computational elements to drastically reduce the latency of nonlinear computations. We implement electro-optic alternatives to digital Softmax and Sigmoid, and evaluate their performance in Vision Transformers and Large Language Models. Our system maintains highly competitive accuracy, even under aggressive 4-bit input-output quantization of the analog units. We further characterize system noise at encoding speeds up to 10 GBaud and assess model robustness under various noise conditions. Our findings suggest that TFLN modulators can serve as nonlinear function units within hybrid co-packaged hardware, enabling high-speed and energy-efficient nonlinear computation.
description_zh: 该论文针对Transformer架构中Softmax/Sigmoid等非线性计算成为推理延迟瓶颈的问题(虽然仅占1%算力但严重拖慢整体速度)，提出用薄膜铌酸锂(TFLN)马赫-曾德尔调制器(MZM)作为模拟非线性计算单元。核心机制是利用电光效应在光域直接完成非线性映射，避免数字电路的串行计算。团队在Vision Transformer和大语言模型上验证，即使在激进的4-bit量化下仍保持竞争力准确率，并在10 GBaud编码速度下完成噪声特性测试。目标用户是需要超低延迟AI推理的场景(如实时视频分析、高频交易)，以及未来co-packaged光电混合硬件的设计者。当前成果是完整的原理验证和系统级噪声鲁棒性分析，为光子AI加速器提供了关键的非线性计算模块方案
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

full_profile.one_liner: Integrated electro-optic attention nonlinearities — 用光子芯片替代Transformer中的Softmax计算，实现10 GBaud速度的模拟非线性
full_profile.overview_zh: 该论文针对Transformer架构中Softmax/Sigmoid等非线性计算成为推理延迟瓶颈的问题(虽然仅占1%算力但严重拖慢整体速度)，提出用薄膜铌酸锂(TFLN)马赫-曾德尔调制器(MZM)作为模拟非线性计算单元。核心机制是利用电光效应在光域直接完成非线性映射，避免数字电路的串行计算。团队在Vision Transformer和大语言模型上验证，即使在激进的4-bit量化下仍保持竞争力准确率，并在10 GBaud编码速度下完成噪声特性测试。目标用户是需要超低延迟AI推理的场景(如实时视频分析、高频交易)，以及未来co-packaged光电混合硬件的设计者。当前成果是完整的原理验证和系统级噪声鲁棒性分析，为光子AI加速器提供了关键的非线性计算模块方案
full_profile.biz_model_zh: 作为学术论文，当前无直接商业模式。潜在路径：①授权专利给AI芯片公司(如Lightmatter/Luminous Computing)集成到光子加速器产品中，按芯片出货量收取royalty；②孵化硬件创业公司，向云厂商/边缘设备商销售专用推理加速卡，按TOPS/W性能溢价定价；③与Nvidia/Google等合作开发下一代co-packaged optics方案。用户付费逻辑是：当推理延迟降低10x且能耗降低100x时，数据中心愿意为专用硬件支付3-5x溢价(参考TPU定价)。与纯数字方案的差异是通过物理模拟计算绕过冯诺依曼瓶颈，但需要解决光电转换开销和大规模集成问题
full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角：这是罕见的「物理定律级」突破——用光速和电光效应的本征特性解决数字计算的根本限制。Alpha在于：①市场严重低估Softmax延迟问题(所有人盯着FLOPS，忽视了非线性计算的串行瓶颈)；②TFLN技术成熟度已达商用级(5G调制器大规模量产)，但AI社区尚未意识到其潜力；③timing完美——Transformer推理需求爆发+光子计算投资热潮。风险：①光电转换overhead可能抵消增益(论文未给端到端latency数据)；②4-bit量化虽然work但限制了适用模型范围；③需要重新设计整个计算栈(编译器/runtime)，生态建设周期长。我们的投资论文适配点：如果
full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得0分：这是硬件层技术，不涉及AI应用设计。Niche得24分(满分25)：①方向极其小众——全球做光子非线性计算的不超过5个团队；②TFLN+Transformer的交叉几乎无人探索；③已形成专利壁垒(MZM用于Softmax的特定配置)；④需要光学+AI+半导体三重expertise，复现门槛极高。扣1分因为缺少私有数据飞轮(硬件项目特性)。商业模式得0分：纯学术阶段无变现计划。团队得12分：ETH Zurich光子学组+苏黎世大学AI组联合，Rachel Grange是TFLN领域权威(>100篇论文)，Bhavin Shastri是光子神经网络先驱，但团队偏学术且无明确商业化意图，创始人年龄/背景信息不足。加分+8：①挑战Transformer核心瓶颈+3；②10 GBaud实测数据证明可行性+2；③ETH背景+顶会潜力+3。减分-3：信息严重不足(无团队商业化计
full_profile.metrics_summary: arXiv论文，无商业指标。技术指标：10 GBaud编码速度(相当于10 Gbps数据吞吐)，4-bit量化下模型准确率保持竞争力(具体数值未在摘要中披露)，已完成Vision Transformer和LLM的系统级验证。团队发表记录：Rachel Grange H-index 40+，Bhavin Shastri Nature Photonics一作。无GitHub/ProductHunt/融资数据

title: Large Language Models Generate Harmful Content Using a Distinct, Unified Mechanism
description_en: Large language models (LLMs) undergo alignment training to avoid harmful behaviors, yet the resulting safeguards remain brittle: jailbreaks routinely bypass them, and fine-tuning on narrow domains can induce ``emergent misalignment'' that generalizes broadly. Whether this brittleness reflects a fundamental lack of coherent internal organization for harmfulness remains unclear. Here we use targeted weight pruning as a causal intervention to probe the internal organization of harmfulness in LLMs. We find that harmful content generation depends on a compact set of weights that are general across harm types and distinct from benign capabilities. Aligned models exhibit a greater compression of harm generation weights than unaligned counterparts, indicating that alignment reshapes harmful representations internally--despite the brittleness of safety guardrails at the surface level. description_zh: 该研究探讨了大型语言模型（LLMs）在生成有害内容时的内部机制，揭示了有害性与良性能力之间的权重差异，强调了对齐训练的局限性。通过目标权重修剪，研究提供了对有害内容生成的深入理解。

title: BERT-as-a-Judge: A Robust Alternative to Lexical Methods for Efficient Reference-Based LLM Evaluation
description_en: Accurate evaluation is central to the large language model (LLM) ecosystem, guiding model selection and downstream adoption across diverse use cases. In practice, however, evaluating generative outputs typically relies on rigid lexical methods to extract and assess answers, which can conflate a model's true problem-solving ability with its compliance with predefined formatting guidelines. While recent LLM-as-a-Judge approaches mitigate this issue by assessing semantic correctness rather than strict structural conformity, they also introduce substantial computational overhead, making evaluation costly. In this work, we first systematically investigate the limitations of lexical evaluation through a large-scale empirical study spanning 36 models and 15 downstream tasks, demonstrating that such methods correlate poorly with human judgments. description_zh: BERT-as-a-Judge 提供了一种基于语义的评估方法，旨在解决传统词汇评估方法的局限性。该方法通过大规模实证研究，展示了其在多种下游任务中的有效性，能够更准确地反映模型的真实问题解决能力。

title: RIRF: Reasoning Image Restoration Framework
description_en: Universal image restoration (UIR) aims to recover clean images from diverse and unknown degradations using a unified model. Existing UIR methods primarily focus on pixel reconstruction and often lack explicit diagnostic reasoning over degradation composition, severity, and scene semantics prior to restoration. We propose Reason and Restore (R\&R), a novel framework that integrates structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning into the image restoration pipeline. R\&R introduces an explicit reasoner, implemented by fine-tuning Qwen3-VL, to diagnose degradation types, quantify degradation severity, infer key degradation-related factors, and describe relevant scene and object semantics. The resulting structured reasoning provides interpretable and fine-grained diagnostic priors for the restorer. To further improve restoration quality, the quantified degradation severity produced by the reasoner is leveraged as reinforcement learning (RL) signals to guide and strengthen the restorer. Unlike
description_zh: RIRF 旨在通过统一模型从多种未知退化中恢复清晰图像，采用结构化的推理方法，提供可解释的诊断先验，提升恢复质量。该框架在图像恢复领域具有创新性，适用于多种场景。

title: Realizing Immersive Volumetric Video: A Multimodal Framework for 6-DoF VR Engagement
description_en: Fully immersive experiences that tightly integrate 6-DoF visual and auditory interaction are essential for virtual and augmented reality. While such experiences can be achieved through computer-generated content, constructing them directly from real-world captured videos remains largely unexplored. We introduce Immersive Volumetric Videos, a new volumetric media format designed to provide large 6-DoF interaction spaces, audiovisual feedback, and high-resolution, high-frame-rate dynamic content. To support IVV construction, we present ImViD, a multi-view, multi-modal dataset built upon a space-oriented capture philosophy. Our custom capture rig enables synchronized multi-view video-audio acquisition during motion, facilitating efficient capture of complex indoor and outdoor scenes with rich foreground--background interactions and challenging dynamics. title: SCoRe: Clean Image Generation from Diffusion Models Trained on Noisy Images
description_en: Diffusion models trained on noisy datasets often reproduce high-frequency training artifacts, significantly degrading generation quality. To address this, we propose SCoRe (Spectral Cutoff Regeneration), a training-free, generation-time spectral regeneration method for clean image generation from diffusion models trained on noisy images. Leveraging the spectral bias of diffusion models, which infer high-frequency details from low-frequency cues, SCoRe suppresses corrupted high-frequency components of a generated image via a frequency cutoff and regenerates them via SDEdit. Crucially, we derive a theoretical mapping between the cutoff frequency and the SDEdit initialization timestep based on Radially Averaged Power Spectral Density (RAPSD), which prevents excessive noise injection during regeneration. description_zh: SCoRe是一种无训练的生成时间频谱再生方法，旨在从噪声图像训练的扩散模型中生成干净图像。该方法通过频率截止抑制生成图像中的高频噪声，并利用SDEdit进行再生，显著提升生成质量。

title: Rays as Pixels: Learning A Joint Distribution of Videos and Camera Trajectories
description_en: Recovering camera parameters from images and rendering scenes from novel viewpoints have long been treated as separate tasks in computer vision and graphics. This separation breaks down when image coverage is sparse or poses are ambiguous, since each task needs what the other produces. We propose Rays as Pixels, a Video Diffusion Model (VDM) that learns a joint distribution over videos and camera trajectories. We represent each camera as dense ray pixels (raxels) and denoise them jointly with video frames through Decoupled Self-Cross Attention mechanism. A single trained model handles three tasks: predicting camera trajectories from video, jointly generating video and camera trajectory from input images, and generating video from input images along a target camera trajectory. description_zh: Rays as Pixels 提出了一个视频扩散模型，能够联合学习视频和相机轨迹，解决了计算机视觉中相机参数恢复与场景渲染的分离问题。该模型通过稀疏图像覆盖和模糊姿态的挑战，提升了视频生成和相机轨迹预测的效率。

title: PhysInOne: Visual Physics Learning and Reasoning in One Suite
description_en: We present PhysInOne, a large-scale synthetic dataset addressing the critical scarcity of physically-grounded training data for AI systems. Unlike existing datasets limited to merely hundreds or thousands of examples, PhysInOne provides 2 million videos across 153,810 dynamic 3D scenes, covering 71 basic physical phenomena in mechanics, optics, fluid dynamics, and magnetism. Distinct from previous works, our scenes feature multiobject interactions against complex backgrounds, with comprehensive ground-truth annotations including 3D geometry, semantics, dynamic motion, physical properties, and text descriptions. We demonstrate PhysInOne's efficacy across four emerging applications: physics-aware video generation, long-/short-term future frame prediction, physical property estimation, and motion transfer. title: Integrated electro-optic attention nonlinearities for transformers
description_en: Transformers have emerged as the dominant neural-network architecture, achieving state-of-the-art performance in language processing and computer vision. At the core of these models lies the attention mechanism, which requires a nonlinear, non-negative mapping using the Softmax function. However, although Softmax operations account for less than 1% of the total operation count, they can disproportionately bottleneck overall inference latency. Here, we use thin-film lithium niobate (TFLN) Mach-Zehnder modulators (MZMs) as analog nonlinear computational elements to drastically reduce the latency of nonlinear computations. We implement electro-optic alternatives to digital Softmax and Sigmoid, and evaluate their performance in Vision Transformers and Large Language Models. Our system maintains highly competitive accuracy, even under aggressive 4-bit input-output quantization of the analog units. We further characterize system noise at encoding speeds up to 10 GBaud and assess model robust

title: SafeAdapt: Provably Safe Policy Updates in Deep Reinforcement Learning
description_en: Safety guarantees are a prerequisite to the deployment of reinforcement learning (RL) agents in safety-critical tasks. Often, deployment environments exhibit non-stationary dynamics or are subject to changing performance goals, requiring updates to the learned policy. This leads to a fundamental challenge: how to update an RL policy while preserving its safety properties on previously encountered tasks? The majority of current approaches either do not provide formal guarantees or verify policy safety only a posteriori. We propose a novel a priori approach to safe policy updates in continual RL by introducing the Rashomon set: a region in policy parameter space certified to meet safety constraints within the demonstration data distribution. We then show that one can provide formal, provable guarantees for arbitrary RL algorithms used to update a policy by projecting their updates onto the Rashomon set. Empirically, we validate this approach across grid-world navigation environments (Fro
description_zh: SafeAdapt专注于深度强化学习中的安全策略更新，提出了Rashomon集的概念，以确保在动态环境中更新策略时保持安全性。该技术为安全关键任务的RL代理提供了理论保障。

title: AdaCubic: An Adaptive Cubic Regularization Optimizer for Deep Learning
description_en: A novel regularization technique, AdaCubic, is proposed that adapts the weight of the cubic term. The heart of AdaCubic is an auxiliary optimization problem with cubic constraints that dynamically adjusts the weight of the cubic term in Newton's cubic regularized method. We use Hutchinson's method to approximate the Hessian matrix, thereby reducing computational cost. We demonstrate that AdaCubic inherits the cubically regularized Newton method's local convergence guarantees. Our experiments in Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing, and Signal Processing tasks demonstrate that AdaCubic outperforms or competes with several widely used optimizers. Unlike other adaptive algorithms that require hyperparameter fine-tuning, AdaCubic is evaluated with a fixed set of hyperparameters, rendering it a highly attractive optimizer in settings where fine-tuning is infeasible. title: Process Reward Agents for Steering Knowledge-Intensive Reasoning
description_en: Reasoning in knowledge-intensive domains remains challenging as intermediate steps are often not locally verifiable: unlike math or code, evaluating step correctness may require synthesizing clues across large external knowledge sources. As a result, subtle errors can propagate through reasoning traces, potentially never to be detected. Prior work has proposed process reward models (PRMs), including retrieval-augmented variants, but these methods operate post hoc, scoring completed trajectories, which prevents their integration into dynamic inference procedures. Here, we introduce Process Reward Agents (PRA), a test-time method for providing domain-grounded, online, step-wise rewards to a frozen policy. In contrast to prior retrieval-augmented PRMs, PRA enables search-based decoding to rank and prune candidate trajectories at every generation step. description_zh: Process Reward Agents (PRA) 旨在解决知识密集型推理中的错误传播问题，通过在线提供逐步奖励，提升推理过程的准确性。该方法在医疗推理等多个领域进行了实验验证，展示了其有效性。

title: Many Ways to Be Fake: Benchmarking Fake News Detection Under Strategy-Driven AI Generation
description_en: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled the large-scale generation of highly fluent and deceptive news-like content. While prior work has often treated fake news detection as a binary classification problem, modern fake news increasingly arises through human-AI collaboration, where strategic inaccuracies are embedded within otherwise accurate and credible narratives. These mixed-truth cases represent a realistic and consequential threat, yet they remain underrepresented in existing benchmarks. To address this gap, we introduce MANYFAKE, a synthetic benchmark containing 6,798 fake news articles generated through multiple strategy-driven prompting pipelines that capture many ways fake news can be constructed and refined. Using this benchmark, we evaluate a range of state-of-the-art fake news detectors. title: You Can't Fight in Here! This is BBS!
description_en: Norm, the formal theoretical linguist, and Claudette, the computational language scientist, have a lovely time discussing whether modern language models can inform important questions in the language sciences. Just as they are about to part ways until they meet again, 25 of their closest friends show up -- from linguistics, neuroscience, cognitive science, psychology, philosophy, and computer science. We use this discussion to highlight what we see as some common underlying issues: the String Statistics Strawman (the mistaken idea that LMs can't be linguistically competent or interesting because they, like their Markov model predecessors, are statistical models that learn from strings) and the As Good As it Gets Assumption (the idea that LM research as it stands in 2026 is the limit of what it can tell us about linguistics). title: Many-Tier Instruction Hierarchy in LLM Agents
description_en: Large language model agents receive instructions from many sources-system messages, user prompts, tool outputs, and more-each carrying different levels of trust and authority. When these instructions conflict, models must reliably follow the highest-privilege instruction to remain safe and effective. The dominant paradigm, instruction hierarchy (IH), assumes a fixed, small set of privilege levels (typically fewer than five) defined by rigid role labels (e.g., system > user). This is inadequate for real-world agentic settings, where conflicts can arise across far more sources and contexts. In this work, we propose Many-Tier Instruction Hierarchy (ManyIH), a paradigm for resolving instruction conflicts among instructions with arbitrarily many privilege levels. We introduce ManyIH-Bench, the first benchmark for ManyIH. description_zh: 该项目提出了一种多层次指令层级（ManyIH）的方法，旨在解决大型语言模型在接收来自不同来源的指令时的冲突问题。通过引入ManyIH-Bench基准，模型能够处理多达12个层级的指令冲突，提升了模型的安全性和有效性。

title: Automated Instruction Revision (AIR): A Structured Comparison of Task Adaptation Strategies for LLM
description_en: This paper studies Automated Instruction Revision (AIR), a rule-induction-based method for adapting large language models (LLMs) to downstream tasks using limited task-specific examples. We position AIR within the broader landscape of adaptation strategies, including prompt optimization, retrieval-based methods, and fine-tuning. We then compare these approaches across a diverse benchmark suite designed to stress different task requirements, such as knowledge injection, structured extraction, label remapping, and logical reasoning. The paper argues that adaptation performance is strongly task-dependent: no single method dominates across all settings. Across five benchmarks, AIR was strongest or near-best on label-remapping classification, while KNN retrieval performed best on closed-book QA, and fine-tuning dominated structured extraction and event-order reasoning. title: EgoTL: Egocentric Think-Aloud Chains for Long-Horizon Tasks
description_en: Large foundation models have made significant advances in embodied intelligence, enabling synthesis and reasoning over egocentric input for household tasks. However, VLM-based auto-labeling is often noisy because the primary data sources lack accurate human action labels, chain-of-thought (CoT), and spatial annotations; these errors are amplified during long-horizon spatial instruction following. These issues stem from insufficient coverage of minute-long, daily household planning tasks and from inaccurate spatial grounding. As a result, VLM reasoning chains and world-model synthesis can hallucinate objects, skip steps, or fail to respect real-world physical attributes. To address these gaps, we introduce EgoTL. EgoTL builds a think-aloud capture pipeline for egocentric data. title: VisionFoundry: Teaching VLMs Visual Perception with Synthetic Images
description_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) still struggle with visual perception tasks such as spatial understanding and viewpoint recognition. One plausible contributing factor is that natural image datasets provide limited supervision for low-level visual skills. This motivates a practical question: can targeted synthetic supervision, generated from only a task keyword such as Depth Order, address these weaknesses? To investigate this question, we introduce VisionFoundry, a task-aware synthetic data generation pipeline that takes only the task name as input and uses large language models (LLMs) to generate questions, answers, and text-to-image (T2I) prompts, then synthesizes images with T2I models and verifies consistency with a proprietary VLM, requiring no reference images or human annotation. Using VisionFoundry, we construct VisionFoundry-10K, a synthetic visual question answering (VQA) dataset containing 10k image-question-answer triples spanning 10 tasks. Models trained on VisionFoundry-10K
description_zh: VisionFoundry是一个任务感知的合成数据生成管道，旨在通过合成图像提升视觉语言模型（VLM）的视觉感知能力。该系统仅需任务名称作为输入，利用大型语言模型生成问题、答案和文本到图像的提示，从而合成图像并验证一致性。

title: AsymLoc: Towards Asymmetric Feature Matching for Efficient Visual Localization
description_en: Precise and real-time visual localization is critical for applications like AR/VR and robotics, especially on resource-constrained edge devices such as smart glasses, where battery life and heat dissipation can be a primary concerns. While many efficient models exist, further reducing compute without sacrificing accuracy is essential for practical deployment. To address this, we propose asymmetric visual localization: a large Teacher model processes pre-mapped database images offline, while a lightweight Student model processes the query image online. This creates a challenge in matching features from two different models without resorting to heavy, learned matchers.   We introduce AsymLoc, a novel distillation framework that aligns a Student to its Teacher through a combination of a geometry-driven matching objective and a joint detector-descriptor distillation objective, enabling fast, parameter-less nearest-neighbor matching. title: SynFlow: Scaling Up LiDAR Scene Flow Estimation with Synthetic Data
description_en: Reliable 3D dynamic perception requires models that can anticipate motion beyond predefined categories, yet progress is hindered by the scarcity of dense, high-quality motion annotations. While self-supervision on unlabeled real data offers a path forward, empirical evidence suggests that scaling unlabeled data fails to close the performance gap due to noisy proxy signals. In this paper, we propose a shift in paradigm: learning robust real-world motion priors entirely from scalable simulation. We introduce SynFlow, a data generation pipeline that generates large-scale synthetic dataset specifically designed for LiDAR scene flow. Unlike prior works that prioritize sensor-specific realism, SynFlow employs a motion-oriented strategy to synthesize diverse kinematic patterns across 4,000 sequences ($\sim$940k frames), termed SynFlow-4k. title: ANTIC: Adaptive Neural Temporal In-situ Compressor
description_en: The persistent storage requirements for high-resolution, spatiotemporally evolving fields governed by large-scale and high-dimensional partial differential equations (PDEs) have reached the petabyte-to-exabyte scale. Transient simulations modeling Navier-Stokes equations, magnetohydrodynamics, plasma physics, or binary black hole mergers generate data volumes that are prohibitive for modern high-performance computing (HPC) infrastructures. To address this bottleneck, we introduce ANTIC (Adaptive Neural Temporal in situ Compressor), an end-to-end in situ compression pipeline. ANTIC consists of an adaptive temporal selector tailored to high-dimensional physics that identifies and filters informative snapshots at simulation time, combined with a spatial neural compression module based on continual fine-tuning that learns residual updates between adjacent snapshots using neural fields. title: Toward World Models for Epidemiology
description_en: World models have emerged as a unifying paradigm for learning latent dynamics, simulating counterfactual futures, and supporting planning under uncertainty. In this paper, we argue that computational epidemiology is a natural and underdeveloped setting for world models. This is because epidemic decision-making requires reasoning about latent disease burden, imperfect and policy-dependent surveillance signals, and intervention effects are mediated by adaptive human behavior. We introduce a conceptual framework for epidemiological world models, formulating epidemics as controlled, partially observed dynamical systems in which (i) the true epidemic state is latent, (ii) observations are noisy and endogenous to policy, and (iii) interventions act as sequential actions whose effects propagate through behavioral and social feedback. title: Offline Local Search for Online Stochastic Bandits
description_en: Combinatorial multi-armed bandits provide a fundamental online decision-making environment where a decision-maker interacts with an environment across $T$ time steps, each time selecting an action and learning the cost of that action. The goal is to minimize regret, defined as the loss compared to the optimal fixed action in hindsight under full-information. There has been substantial interest in leveraging what is known about offline algorithm design in this online setting. Offline greedy and linear optimization algorithms (both exact and approximate) have been shown to provide useful guarantees when deployed online. We investigate local search methods, a broad class of algorithms used widely in both theory and practice, which have thus far been under-explored in this context. title: NOMAD: Generating Embeddings for Massive Distributed Graphs
description_en: Successful machine learning on graphs or networks requires embeddings that not only represent nodes and edges as low-dimensional vectors but also preserve the graph structure. Established methods for generating embeddings require flexible exploration of the entire graph through repeated use of random walks that capture graph structure with samples of nodes and edges. These methods create scalability challenges for massive graphs with millions-to-billions of edges because single-node solutions have inadequate memory and processing capabilities.   We present NOMAD, a distributed-memory graph embedding framework using the Message Passing Interface (MPI) for distributed graphs. NOMAD implements proximity-based models proposed in the widely popular LINE (Large-scale Information Network Embedding) algorithm. We propose several practical trade-offs to improve the scalability and communication overheads confronted by irregular and distributed graph embedding methods, catering to massive-scale

full_profile.one_liner: Cleo Labs — 全球商品合规AI助手，自动扫描106国19000+监管机构生成合规地图，multi-agent系统MARIA+法律专家验证，解决跨境电商/制造业的合规噩梦
full_profile.overview_zh: Cleo Labs针对跨境实体商品销售的合规痛点：单个产品可能触发100+条跨国法规（材料、标签、认证、海关等），且各国规则差异巨大。其核心产品MARIA是multi-agent AI流水线，自动扫描106个国家的19000+监管机构，生成结构化合规地图(compliance maps)，并由法律专家验证而非纯LLM幻觉输出。目标用户是跨境电商卖家、制造商、品牌方等需要多国合规的企业。产品已在Product Hunt获259票并Featured排名第3，显示市场认可度。解决的是传统需要雇佣各国合规顾问、耗时数月的痛点，将其压缩为自动化流程。
full_profile.biz_model_zh: 典型B2B SaaS订阅模式，按企业规模/SKU数量/目标市场数分层定价的可能性高。核心价值主张是：①替代昂贵的人工合规顾问（传统方式单国合规咨询可能数万美元）②降低合规风险导致的罚款/召回/清关延误成本（这些成本往往是订阅费的10-100倍）③加速产品上市时间。用户付费意愿强因为合规是刚需且错误代价极高。与竞品（传统律所/咨询公司）的差异在于：自动化+持续更新+多国覆盖，而非单次项目制咨询。可能存在高级服务层（专家人工复核）的增值收费。
full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角Alpha信号：①极冷门但刚需的niche——全球合规是万亿美元贸易的隐形税，但AI化程度极低，Harvey做通用法律、Cleo做垂直合规，后者数据飞轮更窄更深。②19000+监管机构的数据爬取/结构化本身就是护城河，这是苦活累活但一旦建立极难复制。③Multi-agent架构(MARIA)+人工验证的混合模式，避免了纯LLM的幻觉风险，符合高风险场景的落地路径。风险：①合规规则变化频率高，数据维护成本可能侵蚀利润②需要各国法律专家网络，扩张速度受限于人力③大型企业可能自建合规团队而非外包。投资论文适配：符合我们'AI替代知识密集型中后台'的thesis，FDE指数7意
full_profile.score_narrative_zh: AI Native得25分：MARIA multi-agent流水线显示真正的AI-native架构，不是简单prompt调用，而是agent协同+结构化输出+持续监控19000+数据源，已从对话走向确定性工作流（合规地图生成）。但未见用户行为反馈训练的闭环证据，故未给满分。Niche得22分：全球商品合规是极小众但高价值领域，19000+监管机构的数据积累形成明显壁垒，但尚未达到Harvey级别的私有判例数据飞轮（FDE指数7而非9）。商业模式得17分：B2B订阅逻辑清晰，合规刚需支撑付费意愿，但未见结果付费/成功分成的更强模式，且exit路径不如Harvey明确（被Thomson Reuters/LexisNexis收购的可能性存在但不确定）。团队得9分：创始人信息严重不足，无法判断是否1990后、华人、顶级背景，保守给中等偏下分。加分+8：PH Featured排名3显示产品成熟度+

title: Case-Grounded Evidence Verification: A Framework for Constructing Evidence-Sensitive Supervision
description_en: Evidence-grounded reasoning requires more than attaching retrieved text to a prediction: a model should make decisions that depend on whether the provided evidence supports the target claim. In practice, this often fails because supervision is weak, evidence is only loosely tied to the claim, and evaluation does not test evidence dependence directly. We introduce case-grounded evidence verification, a general framework in which a model receives a local case context, external evidence, and a structured claim, and must decide whether the evidence supports the claim for that case. Our key contribution is a supervision construction procedure that generates explicit support examples together with semantically controlled non-support examples, including counterfactual wrong-state and topic-related negatives, without manual evidence annotation. We instantiate the framework in radiology and train a standard verifier on the resulting support task. The learned verifier substantially outperforms b
description_zh: 该项目提出了一种案例基础的证据验证框架，旨在通过生成明确的支持和非支持示例来增强监督效果。应用于放射学领域，提升模型对证据的依赖性判断。

title: Across the Levels of Analysis: Explaining Predictive Processing in Humans Requires More Than Machine-Estimated Probabilities
description_en: Under the lens of Marr's levels of analysis, we critique and extend two claims about language models (LMs) and language processing: first, that predicting upcoming linguistic information based on context is central to language processing, and second, that many advances in psycholinguistics would be impossible without large language models (LLMs). We further outline future directions that combine the strengths of LLMs with psycholinguistic models.
description_zh: 该论文从Marr的分析层次出发，批判并扩展了关于语言模型和语言处理的两项主张，探讨了上下文预测在语言处理中的重要性，并提出了结合大型语言模型与心理语言学模型的未来方向。
track_reason: arXiv论文，纯技术研究。

title: Envisioning the Future, One Step at a Time
description_en: Accurately anticipating how complex, diverse scenes will evolve requires models that represent uncertainty, simulate along extended interaction chains, and efficiently explore many plausible futures. Yet most existing approaches rely on dense video or latent-space prediction, expending substantial capacity on dense appearance rather than on the underlying sparse trajectories of points in the scene. This makes large-scale exploration of future hypotheses costly and limits performance when long-horizon, multi-modal motion is essential. We address this by formulating the prediction of open-set future scene dynamics as step-wise inference over sparse point trajectories. Our autoregressive diffusion model advances these trajectories through short, locally predictable transitions, explicitly modeling the growth of uncertainty over time. This dynamics-centric representation enables fast rollout of thousands of diverse futures from a single image, optionally guided by initial constraints on mo

title: Open Comet
description_en: Open Comet is a high-fidelity AI agent that lives in your browser’s sidepanel. Unlike basic assistants, it autonomously browses, researches, and executes multi-step workflows across any website. Built on a "Zero-Data" architecture, it keeps your history local while providing enterprise-grade reasoning. Features include high-fidelity execution guards, STORM-inspired research loops, and full support for both Cloud (BYOK) and Local (Ollama) models.

title: Agentic Jackal: Live Execution and Semantic Value Grounding for Text-to-JQL
description_en: Translating natural language into Jira Query Language (JQL) requires resolving ambiguous field references, instance-specific categorical values, and complex Boolean predicates. Single-pass LLMs cannot discover which categorical values (e.g., component names or fix versions) actually exist in a given Jira instance, nor can they verify generated queries against a live data source, limiting accuracy on paraphrased or ambiguous requests. No open, execution-based benchmark exists for mapping natural language to JQL. We introduce Jackal, the first large-scale, execution-based text-to-JQL benchmark comprising 100,000 validated NL-JQL pairs on a live Jira instance with over 200,000 issues. To establish baselines on Jackal, we propose Agentic Jackal, a tool-augmented agent that equips LLMs with live query execution via the Jira MCP server and JiraAnchor, a semantic retrieval tool that resolves natural-language mentions of categorical values through embedding-based similarity search. Among 9 fro
description_zh: Agentic Jackal 是一个将自然语言转换为Jira查询语言（JQL）的工具，解决了模糊字段引用和复杂布尔谓词的问题。该项目引入了第一个大规模的执行基础文本到JQL基准，包含100,000对经过验证的NL-JQL对，提升了查询的准确性。
track_reason: arXiv论文，纯技术研究

score_breakdown.reason: 项目在技术突破和市场需求上具备潜力，但生态建设尚需加强。

title: ContextPool
description_en: Every AI coding session starts from scratch. You re-debug the same bugs, re-explain decisions you already made. Your agent forgets everything. ContextPool gives your agent persistent memory. It scans your past Cursor and Claude Code sessions, extracts engineering insights (bugs, fixes, design decisions, gotchas), and loads relevant context via MCP at session start. No prompting needed. Works with Claude code, Cursor, Windsurf, and Kiro. Free and open source - team sync available for $7.99/mo.
description_zh: ContextPool 通过持久化记忆解决 AI 编程会话中的重复问题，提升 Agent 效率。它能扫描过去的会话，提取工程洞察，并在会话开始时加载相关上下文，适用于多种工具。

title: Claunnector
description_en: Claunnector is a native macOS menubar app that gives AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and Codex direct access to your Mail, Calendars, Reminders, Contacts, and Notes — all running locally on your Mac. title: LaunchChair
description_en: LaunchChair turns your idea into a structured MVP that actually ships. It auto-generates a full product spec, then creates dynamic prompts with strict agent contracts, scoped tasks, and deep spec context so outputs stay aligned. You build faster with cleaner code and far less iteration, cutting token usage significantly. From validation to build to distribution, everything runs inside one connected workspace.
description_zh: LaunchChair是一款MVP构建工具，能够将创意转化为结构化的产品规格，并通过动态提示和严格的Agent合约来提升开发效率。用户可以在一个连接的工作空间中完成从验证到构建再到分发的所有流程。

title: VisionFoundry: Teaching VLMs Visual Perception with Synthetic Images
description_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) still struggle with visual perception tasks such as spatial understanding and viewpoint recognition. One plausible contributing factor is that natural image datasets provide limited supervision for low-level visual skills. This motivates a practical question: can targeted synthetic supervision, generated from only a task keyword such as Depth Order, address these weaknesses? To investigate this question, we introduce VisionFoundry, a task-aware synthetic data generation pipeline that takes only the task name as input and uses large language models (LLMs) to generate questions, answers, and text-to-image (T2I) prompts, then synthesizes images with T2I models and verifies consistency with a proprietary VLM, requiring no reference images or human annotation. Using VisionFoundry, we construct VisionFoundry-10K, a synthetic visual question answering (VQA) dataset containing 10k image-question-answer triples spanning 10 tasks. Models trained on VisionFoundry-10K achieve substantial improvements on visual perception benchmarks: +7% on MMVP and +10% on CV-Bench-3D, while preserving broader capabilities and showing favorable scaling behavior as data size increases. Our results suggest that limited task-targeted supervision is an important contributor to this bottleneck and that synthetic supervision is a promising path toward more systematic training for VLMs.
description_zh: VisionFoundry解决VLM在空间理解、视角识别等低层视觉任务上的弱点。核心机制：①输入任务关键词(如Depth Order) ②LLM生成问答和T2I提示词 ③T2I模型合成图像 ④VLM验证一致性，全程无需人工标注或参考图像。构建了VisionFoundry-10K数据集(10个任务/1万条三元组)，在MMVP上提升7%、CV-Bench-3D上提升10%，且保持通用能力。这是首个task-aware的合成数据生成pipeline，证明targeted synthetic supervision可弥补自然图像数据集在低层视觉技能上的监督不足。技术路径：LLM做任务分解→T2I做数据生成→VLM做质量验证，形成闭环。

title: Automated Instruction Revision (AIR): A Structured Comparison of Task Adaptation Strategies for LLM
description_en: This paper studies Automated Instruction Revision (AIR), a rule-induction-based method for adapting large language models (LLMs) to downstream tasks using limited task-specific examples. We position AIR within the broader landscape of adaptation strategies, including prompt optimization, retrieval-based methods, and fine-tuning. We then compare these approaches across a diverse benchmark suite designed to stress different task requirements, such as knowledge injection, structured extraction, label remapping, and logical reasoning. The paper argues that adaptation performance is strongly task-dependent: no single method dominates across all settings. Across five benchmarks, AIR was strongest or near-best on label-remapping classification, while KNN retrieval performed best on closed-book QA, and fine-tuning dominated structured extraction and event-order reasoning. AIR is most promising when task behavior can be captured by compact, interpretable instruction rules, while retrieval and fine-tuning remain stronger in tasks dominated by source-specific knowledge or dataset-specific annotation regularities.
description_zh: AIR是一种基于规则归纳的LLM任务适配方法，核心机制是从少量任务样本中自动提取可解释的指令规则，无需大规模微调。论文系统性对比了prompt优化、检索增强、微调等主流适配策略，在5个基准测试中发现：①AIR在标签重映射分类任务上表现最强 ②KNN检索在闭卷QA中最优 ③微调在结构化抽取和事件推理中占优。研究揭示了任务适配的本质差异：当任务行为可用紧凑规则描述时AIR最有效，而知识密集型或数据特定模式的任务更适合检索/微调。这是首个系统性比较不同适配策略适用边界的工作，为实践者提供了任务-方法匹配的决策框架。
track_reason: arXiv论文，研究LLM的task adaptation策略。

plus: 系统性对比了适配策略的适用边界，填补了LLM工程化的方法论空白

full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角的Alpha信号：①这是LLM工程化的关键缺失环节——如何让模型快速适配垂直任务而不依赖昂贵微调，市场严重低估了'适配层'的价值 ②AIR的可解释性是独特优势，在金融/医疗等监管场景中，黑盒微调不可接受，规则归纳方法有刚需 ③论文揭示的'任务-方法匹配'框架本身就是投资地图，帮助我们识别哪些垂直场景适合投资（如标签重映射类的合规审查、内容分类）。风险：①纯学术团队商业化能力未知 ②方法论文容易被大厂快速复现 ③乌克兰地缘政治风险。投资论文适配度：如果团队愿意产品化，这是典型的'技术Alpha转化为产品护城河'机会，符合我们投早期技术突破的策略。

full_profile.metrics_summary: arXiv论文，无商业指标。学术指标：5个benchmark测试（标签重映射/闭卷QA/结构化抽取/事件推理/知识注入），AIR在label-remapping任务上达到near-best性能。无GitHub stars、无用户数、无引用数（新论文）、无funding信息。团队：3位作者Solomiia Bilyk/Volodymyr Getmanskyi/Taras Firman，机构信息未披露，推测为乌克兰研究团队。

title: RIRF: Reasoning Image Restoration Framework
description_en: Universal image restoration (UIR) aims to recover clean images from diverse and unknown degradations using a unified model. Existing UIR methods primarily focus on pixel reconstruction and often lack explicit diagnostic reasoning over degradation composition, severity, and scene semantics prior to restoration. We propose Reason and Restore (R\&R), a novel framework that integrates structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning into the image restoration pipeline. R\&R introduces an explicit reasoner, implemented by fine-tuning Qwen3-VL, to diagnose degradation types, quantify degradation severity, infer key degradation-related factors, and describe relevant scene and object semantics. The resulting structured reasoning provides interpretable and fine-grained diagnostic priors for the restorer. To further improve restoration quality, the quantified degradation severity produced by the reasoner is leveraged as reinforcement learning (RL) signals to guide and strengthen the restorer. Unlike existing multimodal LLM-based agentic systems that decouple reasoning from low-level vision tasks, R\&R tightly couples semantic diagnostic reasoning with pixel-level restoration in a unified framework. Extensive experiments across diverse UIR benchmarks demonstrate that R\&R achieves state-of-the-art performance while offering unique interpretability into the restoration process.
description_zh: RIRF提出了一个将结构化推理与图像修复结合的新框架。传统通用图像修复(UIR)方法只关注像素重建，缺乏对退化类型、严重程度和场景语义的显式诊断。该框架分两步：①推理器(Reasoner)基于Qwen3-VL微调，先诊断图像退化类型(如噪声、模糊、压缩伪影等)、量化退化严重程度、推断退化相关因素并描述场景语义；②修复器(Restorer)利用推理器输出的结构化诊断先验进行像素级修复。创新点在于将退化严重程度量化结果作为强化学习信号反馈给修复器，形成诊断-修复的闭环。与现有多模态LLM代理系统将推理与底层视觉任务解耦不同，RIRF紧密耦合语义诊断推理与像素级修复，在统一框架内实现端到端优化。

full_profile.overview_zh: RIRF提出了一个将结构化推理与图像修复结合的新框架。传统通用图像修复(UIR)方法只关注像素重建，缺乏对退化类型、严重程度和场景语义的显式诊断。该框架分两步：①推理器(Reasoner)基于Qwen3-VL微调，先诊断图像退化类型(如噪声、模糊、压缩伪影等)、量化退化严重程度、推断退化相关因素并描述场景语义；②修复器(Restorer)利用推理器输出的结构化诊断先验进行像素级修复。创新点在于将退化严重程度量化结果作为强化学习信号反馈给修复器，形成诊断-修复的闭环。与现有多模态LLM代理系统将推理与底层视觉任务解耦不同，RIRF紧密耦合语义诊断推理与像素级修复，在统一框架内实现端到端优化。

full_profile.insight_zh: Creekstone视角：这是典型的'技术先行、应用待验证'案例。Alpha潜力在于：①将LLM推理能力引入传统CV任务是大趋势，RIRF是早期探索；②图像修复市场巨大(摄影后期/医疗影像/卫星图像/监控视频)但现有方案黑盒化严重，可解释性是真实需求；③RL+诊断先验的闭环设计有一定创新性。风险：①Qwen3-VL微调成本高，推理速度可能无法满足实时需求；②与Magnific AI/Topaz等商业产品相比缺乏用户验证；③纯学术团队商业化能力存疑。投资论文适配度中等：符合我们关注'AI重构传统CV'的方向,但需要看到产品化路径和团队执行力证明才能进一步跟进。

title: PhysInOne: Visual Physics Learning and Reasoning in One Suite
description_en: We present PhysInOne, a large-scale synthetic dataset addressing the critical scarcity of physically-grounded training data for AI systems. Unlike existing datasets limited to merely hundreds or thousands of examples, PhysInOne provides 2 million videos across 153,810 dynamic 3D scenes, covering 71 basic physical phenomena in mechanics, optics, fluid dynamics, and magnetism. Distinct from previous works, our scenes feature multiobject interactions against complex backgrounds, with comprehensive ground-truth annotations including 3D geometry, semantics, dynamic motion, physical properties, and text descriptions. We demonstrate PhysInOne's efficacy across four emerging applications: physics-aware video generation, long-/short-term future frame prediction, physical property estimation, and motion transfer. Experiments show that fine-tuning foundation models on PhysInOne significantly enhances physical plausibility, while also exposing critical gaps in modeling complex physical dynamics and estimating intrinsic properties. As the largest dataset of its kind, orders of magnitude beyond prior works, PhysInOne establishes a new benchmark for advancing physics-grounded world models in generation, simulation, and embodied AI.
description_zh: PhysInOne是一个大规模合成物理数据集，包含200万视频、153,810个动态3D场景，覆盖力学、光学、流体力学和磁学的71种基础物理现象。与现有数据集仅数百或数千样本不同，该数据集提供多物体交互的复杂场景，包含完整的ground-truth标注：3D几何、语义、动态运动、物理属性和文本描述。论文展示了四个应用方向：物理感知视频生成、长短期未来帧预测、物理属性估计和运动迁移。实验证明在PhysInOne上微调基础模型能显著提升物理合理性，同时也暴露了现有模型在复杂物理动力学建模和内在属性估计上的关键缺陷。这是同类数据集中规模最大的，比先前工作大几个数量级，为物理世界模型建立了新基准。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。

title: Toward World Models for Epidemiology
description_en: World models have emerged as a unifying paradigm for learning latent dynamics, simulating counterfactual futures, and supporting planning under uncertainty. In this paper, we argue that computational epidemiology is a natural and underdeveloped setting for world models. This is because epidemic decision-making requires reasoning about latent disease burden, imperfect and policy-dependent surveillance signals, and intervention effects are mediated by adaptive human behavior. We introduce a conceptual framework for epidemiological world models, formulating epidemics as controlled, partially observed dynamical systems in which (i) the true epidemic state is latent, (ii) observations are noisy and endogenous to policy, and (iii) interventions act as sequential actions whose effects propagate through behavioral and social feedback. We present three case studies that illustrate why explicit world modeling is necessary for policy-relevant reasoning: strategic misreporting in behavioral surveillance, systematic delays in time-lagged signals such as hospitalizations and deaths, and counterfactual intervention analysis where identical histories diverge under alternative action sequences.
description_zh: 该论文提出将World Model（世界模型）这一AI范式引入计算流行病学领域。核心问题是：流行病决策需要推理潜在疾病负担、处理不完美且受政策影响的监测信号、以及理解通过人类行为反馈传播的干预效果。论文将流行病建模为受控的、部分可观测的动态系统，其中(i)真实疫情状态是潜在的，(ii)观测数据有噪声且内生于政策，(iii)干预措施作为序列行动通过行为和社会反馈传播效果。通过三个案例研究展示了显式世界建模的必要性：行为监测中的战略性误报、住院和死亡等滞后信号的系统性延迟、以及反事实干预分析（相同历史在不同行动序列下的分歧）。这是首次系统性地将强化学习中的World Model框架应用于公共卫生决策场景。
track_reason: arXiv论文，主要价值是技术突破本身。
